base:
Create a clean hand-painted top-down 2D RPG game map, 1024x768.
This is a BASE GROUND MAP ONLY for a layered raster exploration scene.
Map brief: small forest shrine
Style: clean HD hand-painted top-down 2D RPG game asset style, sharp readable terrain shapes, crisp silhouettes, smooth painted surfaces, low texture noise.
Include terrain, paths, grass, floor materials, low ground markings, and flat anchor pads.
Do not include tall collidable objects: no buildings, gates, fences, lanterns, trees, signs, barrels, NPCs, monsters, UI, labels, or text.
Leave clear empty spaces where props will be placed later.
Make walkable paths and zone boundaries easy to trace.
No border frame, no watermark.
dressed_reference:
Use the provided image as the exact base map reference.
Create a dressed-reference version of the same top-down RPG map, 1024x768, by adding props only.
Preserve exactly: camera, framing, image size, terrain, paths, map boundaries, and all walkable routes.
Do not crop, zoom, rotate, repaint, or redesign the terrain.
Map brief: small forest shrine
Add these props naturally on top of the existing map: oak_tree: large oak tree with rounded canopy and visible trunk base, pine_tree: tall pine tree with dark green triangular foliage and trunk, stone_lantern: small mossy stone lantern shrine prop, boulder: rounded mossy grey boulder, wooden_sign: small wooden sign post, shrine_roof_canopy: small red shrine roof overhang foreground occluder.
Props should feel intentionally placed along paths, landmarks, encounter-zone edges, rest points, and entrances.
This is a planning reference only, not final runtime art.
No UI, no text, no labels, no watermark. Style: clean HD hand-painted top-down 2D RPG game asset style.

props.oak_tree:
Create a single large oak tree with rounded canopy and visible trunk base as a transparent-game-ready top-down 2D RPG map prop.
Style: clean HD hand-painted top-down 2D RPG game asset style, matching clean hand-painted RPG map assets.
Mostly front-facing top-down RPG object view: upright objects are vertical and centered, with only a small visible top face.
Full object visible, centered, crisp but not chunky outlines.
Background must be 100% solid flat #FF00FF magenta, no gradients, no texture, no shadows, no floor plane.
No text, labels, UI, or watermark.
Entire prop must fit fully inside the image with generous magenta margin on all sides.
